MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JOANNA KOZUBAL, TEL. NO. 864-6962 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER AT 10:15 A.M., THERE IS STILL NO APPEARANCE FOR THE PLAINTIFF, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CENTERSTONE REALTY, D B A CENTERSTONE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Defendant Centerstone Realty'S (Dba Centerstone Property Management) Demurrer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Text Ruling
